meaning: n.有平台可装货的卡车(拖车)
examples: We played up on a flatbed truck, and they danced and mingled on the pavement.
Then it turned into a large black truck with a red flatbed, bearing down on her.
A crane hoists A-12 debris (right) onto a flatbed truck at the site of the 1963 A-12 crash in Utah.
They drop containers onto flatbed rail cars, then pick them back up on the far side.
Where are you going to put a 12, 000-pound potato that travels on a 48-foot-long flatbed trailer?
